subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! If thou desirest to dispel the darkness of the world of nature, enkindle thou a candle of Guidance.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی اگر ظلمت عالم طبیعت را زوال خواهی شمع هدایتی برافروز اگر خرمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @being a source of light; guidance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
